title: いつか咲かすぜ江戸の華！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been some time since Inari One began training at Tracen, and
every day I'm stunned to see just how much she's grown since the last.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Howzat for speed, Boss? Another record crushed to bits!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Howzat for speed, Boss? Another record crushed to bits!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All we did was add a teensy bit more weight to my gym routine, and
I'm already seein' gains... Hehe, aren't I amazin'?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And when I was runnin’, I felt like my speed kinda leveled off, but
then I remembered what you said about goin' too hard, too fast!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And when I was runnin’, I felt like my speed kinda leveled off, but
then I remembered what you said about goin' too hard, too fast!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sure 'nough, soon as I eased up on the gas a bit, everythin' just
started comin' together! You're a genius, Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Haha, c'mon, don't be so shy! Doesn't hurt to brag a little. When the weather's nice, ya say so, don'tcha?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I got my powerful run from Oi, and now I'm refinin' it here at Tracen...
Ahhh, I really got the best of both worlds, didn't I?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tracen really is a good opportunity for her... But none of it would
have been possible without her old trainer pushing her to accept my
offer.
choice_data_list: How's the chief doing, by the way?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, my old teammates told me he's doin' fine. I haven't really
contacted him myself.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I mean, if I called him too much, he'd probs just say, "Ya already left
the nest, quit chirpin' in my ear!" and hang up.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
He gave me the push I needed, so now I gotta fly on my own! And I'm
gonna soar as high as the festival fireworks!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: With that... I'm goin' for another lap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The training regime I've put together is no walk in the park. Yet no
matter what I throw at her, Inari One takes it on with a smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure it's taken a lot of adjustment, but she never says anything
even close to a complaint.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's when I remember something she told me before we started
training together.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Pretty sure ya already know this, Boss, but I'm serious about racin'. No
way I would come all the way to Tracen without a roarin' fire in my
heart.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Pretty sure ya already know this, Boss, but I'm serious about racin'. No
way I would come all the way to Tracen without a roarin' fire in my
heart.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's why I don't want no lukewarm trainin'! Throw caution to the
wind and throw all the gas ya got on this fire!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Inari One doesn't hesitate. She charges in full speed ahead, her
banner flyin' high!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series... Winnin' big there will turn me into a REAL
sensation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as she said, Inari One has been working hard to prepare for her
debut, and it shows. However...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Phew... Ehehe, how'dja like that, Boss?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Phew... Ehehe, how'dja like that, Boss?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sometimes worry that I might be overworking her. But I know if I ever
asked...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: No need to thank me! Not like I did anythin' special anyways.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'd just flash me a big old smile before telling me she can easily
handle whatever I throw at her.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh? Wazzup, Boss? Ya got one serious look on your fa—
choice_data_list: I'm so glad I scouted you!
I'm so glad I scouted you!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh? Wazzup, Boss? Ya got one serious look on your fa—
choice_data_list: I'm so glad I scouted you!
I'm so glad I scouted you!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to betray Inari One's trust in me. I don't want her to regret
coming all this way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her work so hard, I silently swear to turn Inari One into a
racing sensation worthy of the biggest fireworks display ever created.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha, where'd that come from?! Ya sure know how to put a smile on
my face!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But I getcha! Don't worry, once I'm through, all of Japan will be
lookin' to you for scoutin' advice!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But I getcha! Don't worry, once I'm through, all of Japan will be
lookin' to you for scoutin' advice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives me a few enthusiastic pats on the back, and I feel some of
that energy of hers transfer to me.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Glad ya scouted me, huh? Ya got high hopes... or maybe ya
just trust me? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(No doubt about it, I'm stronger than before... And I'm sure soon
enough, I'll be stronger still.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I promise, Chief, my old team... and even you, Boss! I'm gonna run
faster and further than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I promise, Chief, my old team... and even you, Boss! I'm gonna run
faster and further than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep runnin' and runnin'... And if anythin' gets in my way, I'll blow
it to pieces!
